title: indigofera centralis
intro: Indigofera centralis is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Indigofera centralis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and support the immune system. Indigofera centralis is traditionally used in herbal preparations, often in the form of a decoction or infusion, and is also used in some traditional medicine practices to treat various ailments.
